chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-4131 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 25.08.2025 Syed Fazal-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Masroor Ahmed, Advocate for KWSC along with Muhammad Ashraf, Superintendent [KWSC]. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, AAG. --------------------- Mr. Muhammad Ashraf, Superintendent KWSC, has placed on record details of the payment and submits that the entire dues have been paid to the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Petitioner, however, submits that one slip in respect of Rs.3,00,000/- (Rupees Three Hundred Thousand only) is missing. The Superintendent KWSC, who is present, submits that he will inquire into the matter and ensure payment if the same has not already been made. After such statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Petition. In view of the above, the instant Petition is disposed of. However, if the Petitioner feels that the said amount of Rs.3,00,000/- has not been paid, he may file a Miscellaneous Application for redressal of his grievance. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
